requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 / GSO Standards, 240 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — IEC 62368-1 / GSO标准，240 V / 50 Hz / G型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — IEC 62368-1 / GSO標準，240 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭

summary.en: Qatar operates at 240 V AC / 50 Hz mains supply. The standard plug type is Type G (BS 1363, three-pin square) — the same as Kuwait and the United Kingdom, reflecting Qatar's British administrative legacy. Electrical safety compliance for information and communications technology equipment and audio/video equipment is required to IEC 62368-1 (or its predecessor IEC 60950-1 for legacy products in transitional scope) as adopted under relevant GCC/GSO equivalent standards. The GSO has adopted IEC 62368-1 within its technical regulation framework applicable to GCC member states including Qatar. Mains-powered wireless devices must demonstrate electrical safety conformance, assessed as part of the GSO conformity process or as a technical requirement within the CRA Qatar type approval application. Products must be physically compatible with Qatar mains supply (240 V / 50 Hz) and Type G outlet; Chinese Type I (two or three flat pins) or Type A plugs are not compatible without adaptation. Arabic and English labelling of rated voltage and frequency is preferred.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔市电为240 V交流/50 Hz。标准插头类型为G型（BS 1363，三脚方形）——与科威特和英国相同，反映了卡塔尔的英国行政遗留。信息和通信技术设备及音视频设备的电气安全合规须依据IEC 62368-1（或对于处于过渡范围内传统产品的前身IEC 60950-1），按相关GCC/GSO等效标准执行。GSO已在其适用于GCC成员国（包括卡塔尔）的技术法规框架内采纳IEC 62368-1。市电供电的无线设备须证明电气安全合规性，作为GSO合规流程的一部分或作为卡塔尔CRA型号认证申请的技术要求进行评估。产品须与卡塔尔市电供应（240 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理兼容；中国I型（两或三扁销）或A型插头在不经改造的情况下不兼容。建议以阿拉伯文和英文标注额定电压和频率。
summary.zht: 卡達市電為240 V交流/50 Hz。標準插頭類型為G型（BS 1363，三腳方形）——與科威特和英國相同，反映了卡達的英國行政遺留。資訊和通訊技術設備及音視頻設備的電氣安全合規須依據IEC 62368-1（或對於處於過渡範圍內傳統產品的前身IEC 60950-1），按相關GCC/GSO等效標準執行。GSO已在其適用於GCC成員國（包括卡達）的技術法規框架內採納IEC 62368-1。市電供電的無線裝置須證明電氣安全合規性，作為GSO合規流程的一部分或作為卡達CRA型號認證申請的技術要求進行評估。產品須與卡達市電供應（240 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理相容；中國I型（兩或三扁插）或A型插頭在不經改造的情況下不相容。建議以阿拉伯文和英文標注額定電壓和頻率。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2018 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety — 3rd edition)
GSO IEC 62368-1 (GCC/GSO adoption of IEC 62368-1 for electrical safety)
BS 1363 / Type G plug standard (240 V / 50 Hz Qatar mains)
GSO Technical Regulation for Consumer Electronics Safety (GCC member states)

summary.en: China uses 220 V AC / 50 Hz with Type I (two or three flat-pin angled) and Type A (two flat parallel pins) plug sockets. Electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and progressively GB 4943.23 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for products listed in the CCC catalogue. Chinese products tested to GB 4943.1 carry CCC marks but are rated for 220 V and use Chinese plug types incompatible with Qatar mains without adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（两个斜角扁销）及A型（两个平行扁销）插座。IT及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（相当于IEC 60950-1）及逐步推进的GB 4943.23（相当于IEC 62368-1）执行。CCC认证涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全。依GB 4943.1测试并持有CCC标志的中国产品额定220 V，使用中国插头类型，不经适配与卡塔尔市电不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（兩個斜角扁插）及A型（兩個平行扁插）插座。IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（相當於IEC 60950-1）及逐步推進的GB 4943.23（相當於IEC 62368-1）執行。CCC認證涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全。依GB 4943.1測試並持有CCC標誌的中國產品額定220 V，使用中國插頭類型，不經適配與卡達市電不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011 (IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 60950-1)
GB 4943.23-2023 (audio/video/IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety scope
GB 1002 / GB 2099 (Chinese plug and socket standards — Type I / Type A)

gap.en: Qatar uses 240 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs, while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I or Type A plugs. Wireless devices with mains power supplies must be rated and tested for 240 V and must be supplied with Type G plugs (or appropriate adapter) for Qatar. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 based) is not recognised in Qatar; IEC 62368-1 test evidence under GSO standards is required for mains-powered wireless devices. Power supply unit design or dual-voltage specification (100–240 V) is strongly recommended to serve both China and Qatar markets from a single product variant. Qatar's mains voltage (240 V) is 20 V higher than China (220 V) — dual-voltage power supplies rated 100–240 V / 50–60 Hz eliminate this hardware gap entirely.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔使用240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头，而中国使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插头。带市电电源的无线设备须额定并通过240 V测试，并须为卡塔尔配备G型插头（或适当的转接头）。GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）下的CCC电气安全认证不被卡塔尔承认；市电供电的无线设备须提供GSO标准下的IEC 62368-1测试证据。强烈建议采用额定100–240 V / 50–60 Hz的双电压电源设计，以便单一产品型号同时服务中国和卡塔尔市场。卡塔尔市电电压（240 V）比中国（220 V）高20 V，支持100–240 V的双电压电源可完全消除此硬件差距。
gap.zht: 卡達使用240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭，而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插頭。帶市電電源的無線裝置須額定並通過240 V測試，並須為卡達配備G型插頭（或適當的轉接頭）。GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）下的CCC電氣安全認證不被卡達承認；市電供電的無線裝置須提供GSO標準下的IEC 62368-1測試證據。強烈建議採用額定100–240 V / 50–60 Hz的雙電壓電源設計，以便單一產品型號同時服務中國和卡達市場。卡達市電電壓（240 V）比中國（220 V）高20 V，支持100–240 V的雙電壓電源可完全消除此硬件差距。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardisation Organisation (GCC Standardization Organization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 under GSO standards is required for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Qatar. Qatar uses 240 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs — the same as Kuwait. Chinese power accessories rated for 220 V with Type I or Type A plugs must be adapted or replaced. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted as a substitute; IEC 62368-1 test reports from a GSO/CRA-accepted laboratory are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在卡塔尔销售的市电供电无线设备须符合GSO标准下的IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。卡塔尔使用240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头，与科威特相同。额定220 V的I型或A型中国电源配件须进行适配或更换。GB 4943.1下的CCC认证不可作为替代；须提供经GSO/CRA认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在卡達銷售的市電供電無線裝置須符合GSO標準下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。卡達使用240 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭，與科威特相同。額定220 V的I型或A型中國電源配件須進行適配或更換。GB 4943.1下的CCC認證不可作為替代；須提供經GSO/CRA認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1測試報告。
